_comment: The four authored ROI polygons (strefa-1..4) of production camera a7b76f41-a106-4019-811d-db6f9576d0dc, mirrored verbatim from the platform's analysis_config (restrict_to_zones: true, pose 1280x736) on 2026-07-24. Consumed by the with-zones tiling arm (tiled_zones_1280x736) via --roi-zones: pose.pose_benchmark.zone_bounding_boxes reduces each polygon to its bbox, and tiles are kept only where they intersect one. Scoring stays whole-frame (zones.json hall-1), so a person outside these zones is an honest miss. Shift/pose/restrict_to_zones are intentionally omitted here — only the zone polygons drive the tiling reach.
